title: Scorzonera decumbens
taxonomy: Scorzonera decumbens is classified within the plant family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Scorzonera and is a type of perennial herb. The species is native to the Mediterranean region and is also known as the creeping scorzonera. Scorzonera decumbens is closely related to other species within the Scorzonera genus, which consists of about 40 species. This classification places Scorzonera decumbens within the broader group of dandelion-like plants.

intro: Scorzonera decumbens, also known as upright scorzonera or lesser scorzonera, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties.
